content: Automating a Telegram USER account (userbot/MTProto self-bot) is widely reported to violate Telegram ToS and carries real ban risk including permanent account bans with no explanation and phone-number blocking on re-registration. Risk increases with spammy/bulk patterns. Mitigation for this project: keep userbot actions minimal and human-paced (only casino media search/send), respect flood waits, prefer Bot API where possible, and use a dedicated/expendable account rather than a personal one.
